heading: Grants to upgrade agriculture and food sciences facilities and equipment and support tropical and subtropical agricultural research at insular area land-grant colleges and universities
label: 3222b–2 Grants to upgrade agriculture and food sciences facilities and equipment and support tropical and subtropical agricultural research at insular area land-grant colleges and universities
notes: Codificationand enacted identical sections. was repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246

children.text: acquire, alter, or repair facilities or relevant equipment necessary for conducting agricultural research; and
support tropical and subtropical agricultural research, including pest and disease research.

children.heading: Method of awarding grants
children.label: b Method of awarding grants
children.text: Grants awarded pursuant to this section shall be made in such amounts and under such terms and conditions as the Secretary determines necessary to carry out the purposes of this section.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: c Regulations
children.text: The Secretary may promulgate such rules and regulations as the Secretary considers to be necessary to carry out this section.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $8,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2023.
